message:
fix: prefix internal doc links with /drawmode base path

Hero buttons, Color Presets link, and architecture image were 404ing
because they used absolute paths without the GitHub Pages base path.

files.patch:
@@ -100,7 +100,7 @@ PNG and SVG export uses headless Chrome (puppeteer) to load the Excalidraw libra
 - **CDN**: Pinned to `@excalidraw/excalidraw@0.17.6`
 - **Optional**: `puppeteer` is in `optionalDependencies` — PNG/SVG export gracefully fails if not installed
 
-![Architecture diagram](/architecture.png)
+![Architecture diagram](/drawmode/architecture.png)
 
 ## Dependencies

@@ -6,11 +6,11 @@ hero:
   tagline: LLMs write TypeScript, not raw JSON. One tool, typed SDK, zero prompt engineering.
   actions:
     - text: Get Started
-      link: /getting-started/
+      link: /drawmode/getting-started/
       icon: right-arrow
       variant: primary
     - text: SDK Reference
-      link: /sdk-reference/
+      link: /drawmode/sdk-reference/
       variant: minimal
 ---

@@ -253,4 +253,4 @@ Options for `connect()`:
 
 ### `ColorPreset`
 
-See [Color Presets](/color-presets/) for the full list with hex values.
+See [Color Presets](/drawmode/color-presets/) for the full list with hex values.
